Short CV

Born in 1996, Emine Akgün completed her undergraduate education in Adnan Menderes University Department of Public Administration in 2019 with the highest rank. In the same year, she was entitled to receive her master's degree in Political Science and Public Administration at Trakya University and graduated from Anadolu University, Department of Finance in 2020. She has published articles in various national and international publications.
